name: tidy-review
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,correctness-first,deterministic-output | lens: hickey-carmack | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: FOCUS
required_inputs.description: Which cleanup lens to apply. Defaults to all.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Existing test results, benchmarks, or prior review notes.
